title: Jessica Pegula Wins Tennis Tournament Again
summary: Jessica Pegula is a tennis player from America who won a big tournament called the Charleston Open. She played against Yuliia Starodubtseva, who was in her first final, and won easily with scores of 6-2 and 6-2. This is Pegula's second win this year after she also won in Dubai. She had to play many tough matches that went to three sets to reach the final, and she saved many break points in this match. Pegula thanked the fans for supporting her all week. Starodubtseva made many mistakes but moved up in the world rankings. Pegula now has more wins this year than the top player Aryna Sabalenka.

background_read: Tennis is a sport where players hit a ball over a net. Tournaments like the Charleston Open have many matches, and the winner gets a trophy. Players have rankings based on how many matches they win. Break points are important moments in a game. Fans cheer for players to help them do their best.
Article_Structure: WHO: Jessica Pegula, an American tennis player, and Yuliia Starodubtseva, a Ukrainian tennis player
WHAT: Pegula won the Charleston Open by beating Starodubtseva in the final
WHERE: The tournament happened in Charleston, South Carolina
WHY: To compete for the title and improve her rankings and wins for the year

perspectives.description: Pegula's win shows her skill and consistency in tennis.
